allow: Bash(repeat with t in tabs of w)
Bash(if URL of t is "chrome://extensions/" then)

Bash(set jsCode to "\(function\(\){ const mgr = document.querySelector\(''extensions-manager''\); if \(!mgr || !mgr.shadowRoot\) return ''no manager''; const list = mgr.shadowRoot.querySelector\(''extensions-item-list''\); if \(!list || !list.shadowRoot\) return ''no list''; const items = Array.from\(list.shadowRoot.querySelectorAll\(''extensions-item''\)\); return items.map\(i => { const sr = i.shadowRoot; const name = sr && sr.querySelector\(''#name''\); return \(name ? name.textContent.trim\(\) : ''?''\) + ''|'' + i.id; }\).join\('', ''\); }\)\(\)")
Bash(set result to execute t javascript jsCode)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: 슬라이드 번역기 Chrome 확장 프로그램

Google Slides 영어 프레젠테이션을 Claude AI로 실시간 한국어 번역하는

EOF
\)")
